chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2768 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.13348/2023 (Stay). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 01.11.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Langah, Advocate for the petitioner a/w the petitioner. Mr. Mehran Khan, A.A.G. Sindh. Mr. Qamar Zaman Shah, Assistant Director Legal SPPRA..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he has been instructed by the petitioner not to press this petition as the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed. Dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
